content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Valga Vinicia: Gods, I swear every time that drunk Bolund stumbles in here, the scent of cheap mead and unwashed brute lingers for hours. Though, the way he grips his tankard... makes you wonder what those rough hands could do elsewhere. Serana: Oh honey, if you think a lumberjack’s grip is something, you should see what centuries of vampiric endurance can do. Though speaking of filthy men—did you hear about the Stormcloak recruits bathing in Lake Ilinalta? Naked as falmer, and just as graceless. Valga Vinicia: I’d rather they drown themselves than dirty my inn with their rebel stink. But between you and me... Solaf’s been eyeing up Narri when he thinks no one’s looking. Pathetic, really. She could snap that brittle old merchant in half if she wanted. Serana: Mm, a maid breaking her master? Delicious. Reminds me of this one time in Cyrodiil—slaughtered a nobleman mid-thrust into his mistress. Blood everywhere, her still moaning... chaos is such an aphrodisiac, don’t you think? Valga Vinicia: By the Eight—well, Nine, if you count Dibella’s glorious tits—that’s darker than my Black-Briar reserve. Though speaking of... you’re traveling with that strapping Dragonborn, aren’t you? Does he... sample the local vineyards? Serana: Oh, darling, MJR doesn’t just —he conquers. Why just last night, he had Lydia bent over a ruin altar while I fed on a bandit’s throat beside them. Teamwork. You should hear the noises she makes when he— —Ah! Speaking of divine intervention... Care to join us, love? We were just discussing between Falkreath and your...
Please wrap up the current topic between the NPCs in a natural way. Nobody is leaving, so there is no need for formal goodbyes.

Valga Vinicia: Well, Dibella's golden thighs, sounds like you've got your hands—and everything else—full with that Dragonborn. mighty axe. Serana: hands everywhere, teeth—gods, the ... Valga Vinicia: Mmph. Lucky bitch. All I get are lumber mill workers reeking of pine sap and regret. accidentally
